title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and best practices to protect against cyber threats. The course is part of Harvard's introduction to computer science designed for business audiences and available via edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
